PowerShell($p = "C:\\Eric\\App\\Claude\\Projects\\MeatNet\\source\\web"; if \(Test-Path "$p\\node_modules"\) { Push-Location $p; npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Output "exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; Pop-Location } else { Write-Output "no node_modules" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name Meat,dotnet,devenv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='RAM\(MB\)';E={[int]\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT 'UF='+CAST\(COUNT\(*\) AS varchar\) FROM UnidadesFaenas; SELECT 'ROM='+CAST\(COUNT\(*\) AS varchar\) FROM Romaneos; SELECT 'TIP='+CAST\(COUNT\(*\) AS varchar\) FROM Tipificaciones;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT EspecieId, Numero, Nombre, CodigoMaterial, ERP_Codigo, PiezasPorAnimal, PorDefecto FROM UnidadesFaenas ORDER BY EspecieId, Numero;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT '['+Codigo+']' Codigo, Nombre, PorDefecto, Activo FROM UnidadesFaenas WHERE EspecieId='P' ORDER BY Codigo;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 5 UserName, CodigoEmpresa FROM Usuarios;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='Tipificaciones' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;")

Bash(ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet ef migrations add 50_RomaneoPiezaPesoFueraRango -p Meat.Repositories/Meat.Repositories.csproj -s Meat/Meat.csproj)

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -Q "SET LOCK_TIMEOUT 4000; WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:02'; PRINT 'B: intenta incrementar...'; UPDATE Numeradores SET UltimoNumero = UltimoNumero + 1 WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO' AND EspecieCodigo='P'; PRINT 'B: incremento OK \(NO serializo!\)';")

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -I -Q "BEGIN TRAN; UPDATE Numeradores SET UltimoNumero = UltimoNumero + 1 WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO' AND EspecieCodigo='P'; PRINT 'A: lock tomado'; WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:12'; ROLLBACK TRAN; PRINT 'A: rollback';")

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -I -Q "SET LOCK_TIMEOUT 5000; WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:03'; PRINT 'B: intenta incrementar...'; UPDATE Numeradores SET UltimoNumero = UltimoNumero + 1 WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO' AND EspecieCodigo='P'; PRINT 'B: incremento OK \(NO serializo\)';")

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -I -Q "BEGIN TRAN; UPDATE Numeradores SET UltimoNumero = UltimoNumero + 1 WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO' AND EspecieCodigo='P'; WAITFOR DELAY '00:01:00'; ROLLBACK TRAN;")

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -I -Q "SET LOCK_TIMEOUT 6000; UPDATE Numeradores SET UltimoNumero = UltimoNumero + 1 WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO' AND EspecieCodigo='P'; PRINT 'B: paso sin bloquearse';")

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -I -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT EspecieCodigo, Codigo, UltimoNumero FROM Numeradores WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO'; SELECT EspecieId, MAX\(NumeroRomaneo\) AS MaxRomaneo FROM Romaneos GROUP BY EspecieId;")

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S ".\\sqlexpress" -d MeatNet -E -C -W -I -Q "UPDATE Numeradores SET UltimoNumero = 5 WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO' AND EspecieCodigo='P'; SELECT EspecieCodigo, UltimoNumero FROM Numeradores WHERE TipoNumerador='ROMANEO';")
